query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT e.id, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', p.sortOrder, NOW(), NOW()
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON c.establishmentId = e.id AND c.name = 'Kids'
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Mini Burguer' as name, 'Mini hambúrguer com queijo em pão macio, ideal para crianças' as description, 16.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Nuggets', '6 unidades de nuggets de frango com molho barbecue', 18.90, 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Hot Dog Kids', 'Mini hot dog com salsicha, purê de batata e ketchup', 14.90, 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Mini Pizza', 'Mini pizza de mussarela ou calabresa', 19.90, 4
) p
WHERE e.userId = 180577;
